authority.department: Department of Labour, Government of Karnataka

overview: State-specific labour law requirements applicable to establishments operating in Karnataka.

rules.title: Review Karnataka Shops and Commercial Establishments Registration
rules.description: Determine whether registration under the Karnataka Shops and Commercial Establishments Act is applicable.

citations.reference: Karnataka Shops and Commercial Establishments Act

rules.title: Maintain Statutory Registers and Employment Records
rules.description: Maintain statutory registers, employee records and notices prescribed under Karnataka labour legislation.

rules.title: Display Statutory Notices
rules.description: Display statutory notices, abstracts and employee information required under Karnataka labour laws.

rules.title: Review Working Hours, Overtime, Leave and Weekly Holidays
rules.description: Ensure compliance with Karnataka provisions governing working hours, overtime, leave and weekly holidays.

citations.reference: Karnataka Shops and Commercial Establishments Rules

rules.title: Review Karnataka Professional Tax Compliance
rules.description: Determine whether Professional Tax registration, enrolment, deduction, return filing and payment obligations apply under Karnataka law.

citations.reference: Karnataka Tax on Professions, Trades, Callings and Employments Act

rules.title: Review Karnataka Labour Welfare Fund Compliance
rules.description: Review employer obligations relating to the Karnataka Labour Welfare Fund, including employee and employer contributions where applicable.

rules.title: Review State Notification Compliance
rules.description: Monitor Karnataka Government notifications relating to labour law amendments, exemptions and compliance requirements.

recommended.title: Annual Labour Compliance Audit
recommended.description: Conduct an annual audit covering registrations, payroll compliance, statutory records and labour inspections.

recommended.title: Digital Compliance Calendar
recommended.description: Maintain a digital calendar for licence renewals, statutory returns, labour inspections and compliance due dates.
